content.text: Adversarial attacks subtly perturb {{c1::inputs}} so a model makes a wrong prediction with high confidence.
content.explanation: These attacks reveal fragility and are important for robust deployment.
content.spanish: Los ataques adversariales perturban inputs de forma sutil para que un modelo haga una predicción incorrecta con alta confianza.
content.usage: Critical in vision systems, OCR, and safety-critical AI.

content.text: {{c1::Differential privacy}} limits how much any single record can influence the published model or statistics.
content.explanation: It is a core privacy-preserving technique for sensitive data.
content.spanish: La privacidad diferencial limita cuánto puede influir un único registro en el modelo o estadísticas publicadas.
content.usage: Used in healthcare, finance, and analytics with personal data.

content.text: {{c1::Membership inference}} attacks try to determine whether a specific sample was in the training set.
content.explanation: They expose privacy risks even when the model appears to behave well.
content.spanish: Los ataques de inferencia de membresía intentan determinar si una muestra específica estuvo en el conjunto de entrenamiento.
content.usage: Relevant in sensitive ML datasets and model auditing.

content.text: Prompt injection manipulates an {{c1::LLM}} by inserting instructions that override the intended system behavior.
content.explanation: It is a major concern for agentic and tool-using systems.
content.spanish: La inyección de prompts manipula un LLM insertando instrucciones que sobrescriben el comportamiento del sistema previsto.
content.usage: Critical in LLM apps, copilots, and autonomous assistants.

content.text: {{c1::Model extraction}} tries to approximate a proprietary model by querying it repeatedly.
content.explanation: It is a serious intellectual-property and API-security concern.
content.spanish: La extracción de modelos intenta aproximar un modelo propietario haciendo consultas repetidas.
content.usage: Important for protected models and commercial AI APIs.

content.text: Robustness evaluation tests whether a model remains stable under noise, perturbation, and distribution {{c1::shifts}}.
content.explanation: A model that is accurate in the lab may still be brittle in production.
content.spanish: La evaluación de robustez prueba si un modelo permanece estable bajo ruido, perturbaciones y shifts de distribución.
content.usage: Essential for safety-critical and customer-facing deployment.
